children.heading: Review of State plan by mental health planning council
children.label: a Review of State plan by mental health planning council

children.text: the plan submitted under with respect to the grant and the report of the State under concerning the preceding fiscal year has been reviewed by the State mental health planning council under ; andsection 300x–1(a) of this titlesection 300x–52(a) of this titlesection 300x–3 of this title

the State submits to the Secretary any recommendations received by the State from such council for modifications to the plan (without regard to whether the State has made the recommended modifications) and any comments concerning the annual report.

children.heading: Maintenance of effort regarding State expenditures for mental health
children.label: b Maintenance of effort regarding State expenditures for mental health

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A funding agreement for a grant under is that the State involved will maintain State expenditures for community mental health services at a level that is not less than the average level of such expenditures maintained by the State for the 2-year period preceding the fiscal year for which the State is applying for the grant.section 300x of this title

children.heading: Exclusion of certain funds
children.label: 2 Exclusion of certain funds
children.text: The Secretary may exclude from the aggregate State expenditures under subsection (a), funds appropriated to the principle agency for authorized activities which are of a non-recurring nature and for a specific purpose.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary may, upon the request of a State, waive the requirement established in paragraph (1) in whole or in part if the Secretary determines that extraordinary economic conditions in the State in the fiscal year involved or in the previous fiscal year justify the waiver1So in original. Probably should be followed by a period.1

children.heading: Date certain for action upon request
children.label: B Date certain for action upon request
children.text: The Secretary shall approve or deny a request for a waiver under this paragraph not later than 120 days after the date on which the request is made.

children.heading: Applicability of waiver
children.label: C Applicability of waiver
children.text: A waiver provided by the Secretary under this paragraph shall be applicable only to the fiscal year involved.

children.heading: Determination
children.label: i Determination
children.text: In making a grant under to a State for a fiscal year, the Secretary shall make a determination of whether, for the previous fiscal year, the State maintained material compliance with the agreement made under paragraph (1). If the Secretary determines that a State has failed to maintain such compliance, the Secretary shall reduce the amount of the allotment under for the State for the fiscal year for which the grant is being made by an amount equal to the amount constituting such failure for the previous fiscal year.section 300x of this titlesection 300x of this title

children.heading: Alternative
children.label: ii Alternative
children.text: A State that has failed to comply with paragraph (1) and would otherwise be subject to a reduction in the State’s allotment under may, upon request by the State, in lieu of having the amount of the allotment under for the State reduced for the fiscal year of the grant, agree to comply with a negotiated agreement that is approved by the Secretary and carried out in accordance with guidelines issued by the Secretary. If a State fails to enter into or comply with a negotiated agreement, the Secretary may take action under this paragraph or the terms of the negotiated agreement.section 300x of this titlesection 300x of this title

children.heading: Submission of information to the secretary
children.label: B Submission of information to the secretary
children.text: The Secretary may make a grant under for a fiscal year only if the State involved submits to the Secretary information sufficient for the Secretary to make the determination required in subparagraph (A)(i).section 300x of this title
